title: Plasticxo
description: a plastic themed 1.8.9 pvp texture pack
body:
Plasticxo is a 1.8.9 pvp texture pack made for bedwars but usable in other 1.8.9 gamemodes as well.

It features a very "Plastic" themed with thick black borders arround items.

It was release due to my channel reaching 300 subscribers !

Here are some ingame screenshots :

![plasticxo 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/021ed96970c02a789c0508704d7db2638262c2fd.jpeg)

![plasticxo 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b89dc144fac8964dab5c64594905469c1b95d95.jpeg)

![plasticxo 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f749f7572c9d907f2a33e1ed0ce33fef4af1d4a9.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
